name: Elizabeth David's Flourless Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon brewed espresso (or any other strong brew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees F. and prepare an 8-inch springform pan by greasing it.
2. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate with vanilla and brewed espresso and brandy.
3. Add butter, sugar, and ground almonds, then heat until the butter has melted. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
4. Beat the 3 egg yolks until lemon-colored and stir them into the chocolate mixture.
5. Whip the 3 egg whites until just stiff and fold into the chocolate mixture.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake in the middle of the oven for 45 minutes. The cake will have cracks on top, and a tester inserted into the center will not come out clean. Allow to cool completely on a rack before removing the sides of the pan. The cake may rise and then fall.
Serving suggestions: brush with raspberry jelly; sprinkle with powdered sugar; cover or serve with whipped cream.
